{"step_by_step_thinking": "Ubrogepant is a calcitonin gene-related peptide (CGRP) receptor antagonist. Multiple documents confirm its use in migraine treatment. Document [4] explicitly states that gepants, including ubrogepant, are proven effective for acute migraine treatment. Document [9] specifies that rimegepant and ubrogepant are used for acute treatment of migraine with or without aura. Document [31] confirms that ubrogepant is given orally for the acute treatment of migraine and notes the dosage and administration.
